title: cyathea decorata
intro: Cyathea decorata, also known as the Decorated Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The leaves and stems of the plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, which also offer health benefits including reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Cyathea decorata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
